## Purpose

Describe the problem and the smallest complete solution.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend / MCP
- [ ] Persistence
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build Week presentation

## Evidence

List exact files, screenshots, System Check output, test output or reproduction steps.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `npm run verify:static`
- [ ] `npm run readiness`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `cd server && npm run verify`
- [ ] Tested from a clean browser profile
- [ ] Tested at a mobile viewport

## Safety and governance

- [ ] No secrets or private data were added
- [ ] AI-generated changes were reviewed by a human
- [ ] Capability claims match `docs/CAPABILITY_VERIFICATION_MATRIX.md`
- [ ] Mutating agent behavior remains auditable
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed

## User impact

Explain what a first-time user can now accomplish more reliably or more clearly.

## Remaining limitations

State anything still PARTIAL, EXPERIMENTAL, BLOCKED or UNVERIFIED.
